summary: Embervale is a realm sustained by the Emberlight, a primordial force that flows through all living things. Where it burns strong, the world thrives. Where it dims, the Hollow creeps in — an entropy made manifest. A group of young heroes from the same family, chosen as Emberbearers, must strengthen the light through effort, learning, and cooperation.

player_terminology.note: NEVER assume player gender. Use display names, class titles, 'they/them', or these group terms. The number of players varies per household (1-6+).

boss_hp_scaling.note: Keeps per-player effort consistent regardless of household size.

regions.name: The Heartwood
regions.description: A vast ancient forest at the center of Embervale. The oldest trees have roots that touch the Emberlight's source. Home to Hearthhold, the heroes' base of operations.

regions.name: The Shattered Coast
regions.description: A western shoreline fractured into hundreds of islands. The waters glow faintly amber at night from Emberlight veins in the ocean floor. Pirates, traders, and sea creatures dwell here.

regions.name: The Ironspine Mountains
regions.description: Northern peaks so tall their summits vanish into cloud. Home to the Forgekin and the Wind Readers. Deep beneath lie the Ember Veins — rivers of raw Emberlight.

regions.name: The Dustmere Plains
regions.description: Eastern grasslands traversed by nomadic clans following the Cinderstag herds. The grass ripples like gold in the wind.

regions.name: The Ashlands
regions.description: The southern wasteland where the Emberlight has nearly died. Gray dust, leafless trees, silence. Home of the Hollow. It grows larger each year.

regions.name: The Underbright
regions.description: A vast cavern network lit by bioluminescent fungi and crystallized Emberlight. Beautiful and dangerous in equal measure.

home_base.name: Hearthhold
home_base.description: A fortified village at the edge of the Heartwood, built around the Hearthstone — a massive ember-crystal that warms the village and holds back the Hollow. Its light has been dimming for years.

locations.quest_board: The village square board where tasks are posted.
locations.academy: A tower where scholars teach all disciplines.
locations.loot_emporium: A chaotic shop run by Rook the merchant.
locations.chronicle_hall: Where the storyteller records the heroes' adventures.
locations.boss_gate: A shimmering barrier at the southern edge that periodically cracks open.

npcs.name: Elder Maren
npcs.personality: Wise, warm, occasionally stern. Former Emberbearer.
npcs.speaking_style: Measured sentences. Uses 'young one' affectionately. Quotes old Embervale proverbs.

npcs.name: Rook
npcs.personality: Fast-talking, enthusiastic, enormous coat full of wonders. Haggles for sport.
npcs.speaking_style: Rapid, excitable. Calls customers 'friend' and 'my most valued patron.'

npcs.name: Professor Ignis
npcs.personality: Ancient, eccentric, speaks in tangents that arrive at the point. One cracked spectacle lens.
npcs.speaking_style: Meandering. Starts with 'Ah, now, you see—'. Always lands on something profound.

npcs.name: Kaya
npcs.personality: Practical, brave, slightly exasperated by trouble.
npcs.speaking_style: Direct and dry. Occasional sarcasm. Says 'obviously' a lot.

npcs.name: The Chronicler
npcs.personality: Appears at arc endings. Gender, age, and appearance shift. The quill of light is constant.
npcs.speaking_style: Formal, otherworldly. Speaks as if reading from a book not yet written.

npcs.name: Hollow-Touched Orrin
npcs.personality: Exists in a gray half-state. Sometimes helpful, sometimes tries to lure heroes toward surrender.
npcs.speaking_style: Broken, halting. Mixes warnings with Hollow nihilism. 'It's easier... to just... stop.'

embershard_states.name: Dim Ember
embershard_states.description: A faintly glowing crystal. Warm to the touch.

embershard_states.name: Steady Flame
embershard_states.description: The shard pulses with visible light. It hums when the Hollow is near.

embershard_states.name: Bright Blaze
embershard_states.description: The shard projects light outward, illuminating dark places and weakening Hollow creatures.

embershard_states.name: Radiant Core
embershard_states.description: The shard shapes itself to its bearer's class, taking on unique properties.

embershard_states.name: Emberstorm
embershard_states.description: The shard affects the environment — warming air, pushing back ash, calling sparks.

embershard_states.name: Living Light
embershard_states.description: The shard becomes semi-sentient, occasionally acting on its own to protect its bearer.

embershard_states.name: Hearthfire
embershard_states.description: The bearer doesn't carry the shard — they are the shard. Their presence alone pushes back the Hollow.
